title: PM Modi Live | Mann Ki Baat 131st Episode Live Broadcast
description:
PM Modi Live: In this month’s Mann Ki Baat, PM Modi spoke about his experiences at the India AI Impact Summit held in Delhi. He touched upon many important topics such as Indian-origin cricketers, organ donation, river festivals, digital safety, Pariksha Pe Charcha and more. He highlighted that on 23rd February, 'Rajaji Utsav' will be celebrated at Rashtrapati Bhavan. The PM also paid rich tributes to former Tamil Nadu CM Jayalalithaa ji, noting her deep connection with Nari Shakti.

#mannkibaat #pmmodi #narendramodi
